subcodes.first_line: My face is illumined by the lights of Thy Countenance, and my heart is turned toward the realm of Thy favor, and I beseech from Thee Thine ancient bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وجهم بانوار وجهت متوجه و قلبم بشطر عنایتت مقبل و از تو میطلبم عطای قدیمت و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for prosperity, @prayer for nearness to God, @creation of the world
